title: January 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 15''' is the 15th day of the year. 350 days (351 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1979]] – [[Aubree Miller]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 94|''Star Wars'' (1977) 94]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Dove Cameron]] is born.
*1996 – ''[[The Kathol Outback]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[You Can Draw: Star Wars]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Mark Haigh-Hutchinson]] dies.
*2008 – [[Star Wars Insider 99|''Star Wars Insider'' 99]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Headgames]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2014]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force War 3|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force War'' 3]] published.
*2014 – [[Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows 2|''Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows'' 2]] published.
*2014 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 2 (2014)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' Part 2]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars: The Force Awakens: A Junior Novel (audiobook)|''Star Wars: The Force Awakens: A Junior Novel'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars: Rogue One: A Junior Novel (audiobook)|''Star Wars: Rogue One: A Junior Novel'' audiobook]] released.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Last Jedi Look and Find]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Last Stand 3|''Battle of Jakku — Last Stand'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
